title: Brad Thomas Laser Focused On Earnings And REITs
text: REITs were formed to give individual investors access to quality properties and have evolved over the years. REITs have outperformed stocks and bonds since 1991.

title: Equinix: The Safest Dividend Is The One That's Just Been Raised (By 25%)
text: Equinix just released its 3Q23 earnings, which allows us to get a very fresh perspective on current trends. Despite a complex macro environment, the company delivered a solid quarter, with revenues of $2.06 billion, marking a 14% year-over-year increase. To confirm its confidence, the company announced a 25% dividend hike to $4.26 per share.

title: 5 Stocks to Watch on Recent Dividend Hikes Amid Volatility
text: Investors may keep a tab on stocks like WST, SXI, WCN, MPC and EQIX, which have lately hiked their dividend payments.

title: Equinix's (EQIX) Q3 AFFO Beats, Dividend Hiked, '23 View Up
text: Equinix (EQIX) posts stellar Q3 results backed by strong demand for its colocation and interconnection services. It hikes its dividend payout by 25% and raises AFFO per share guidance for 2023.

title: Equinix, Inc. (EQIX) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Equinix, Inc. (NASDAQ:EQIX ) Q3 2023 Earnings Conference Call October 25, 2023 5:30 PM ET Company Participants Chip Newcom - Senior Director, IR Charles Meyers - CEO Keith Taylor - CFO Conference Call Participants Matt Niknam - Deutsche Bank Frank Louthan - Raymond James Jon Atkin - RBC Capital Markets David Barden - Bank of America Michael Rollins - Citi Eric Luebchow - Wells Fargo Nick Del Deo - MoffettNathanson Operator Good afternoon and welcome to the Equinix's Third Quarter Earnings Conference Call. All lines will be able to listen until we open for question.

title: Equinix (EQIX) Q3 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Equinix (EQIX) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended September 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Equinix (EQIX) Q3 FFO and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Equinix (EQIX) came out with quarterly funds from operations (FFO) of $8.19 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $7.79 per share. This compares to FFO of $7.73 per share a year ago.

title: Equinix Increases Quarterly Dividend on Its Common Stock by 25 Percent
text: REDWOOD CITY, Calif. , Oct. 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ --  Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX), the world's digital infrastructure company®, today announced that its board of directors approved a 25% increase in the company's dividend level and has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $4.26 per share on its common stock.

title: Equinix Reports Third-Quarter 2023 Results
text: REDWOOD CITY, Calif. , Oct. 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Quarterly revenues increased 12% over the same quarter last year to $2.1 billion, or 14% on a normalized and constant currency basis Closed 4,200 deals in Q3 across more than 3,100 customers, including record new logos from high-propensity, targeted customers Channel bookings accounted for over 65% of new logos with wins focused on digital transformation initiatives Increased quarterly cash dividend by 25% to $4.26 per share on its common stock due to continued strong operating performance Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX), the world's digital infrastructure company®, today reported results for the quarter ended September 30, 2023.

title: Equinix (EQIX) to Post Q3 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: Equinix's (EQIX) Q3 earnings are likely to have benefited from the robust demand for data centers and expansionary efforts. However, higher interest expenses might have hurt it.

title: 7 Undervalued REITs to Protect Against a Housing Crisis
text: REITs are down bad this year. REIT stocks across nearly all sectors are down by double digits since January.

title: Beat the Nasdaq? This Dividend Stock Has Actually Done It
text: Since its IPO in 2000, Equinix's total return has edged out that of the Nasdaq Composite index. The data center giant also has been accelerating its dividend growth.

title: My Oh My, 5 Sweet REIT Buys
text: Interest rates have risen due to a stronger-than-expected economy and excess savings from pandemic stimulus. The jobs report was a blowout, sending interest rates soaring once more. REITs have fallen 30%, just like they did from 1972 to 1974. And for the rest of the decade, with interest rates climbing to 16%, REITs soared over 700%.

title: Fire Sale: 2 Cheap REITs To Buy, 1 To Sell
text: REITs have been underperforming in 2023 due to higher interest rates and alternative investment options. Long-term investors may find discounted valuations in high-quality REITs as the rate hike cycle nears its end. REITs are under pressure with many trading at cheap valuations, but some REITs are simply cheap for a reason.

title: 3 Stocks to Avoid This Week
text: There are near-term concerns for Walgreens Boots Alliance, Equinix, and Carvana this week. Equinix and Carvana are beating the market this year, but the market darlings could fall out of favor in the near term.

title: 5 Reasons That Make Equinix (EQIX) Stock a Solid Portfolio Pick
text: The data center industry thrives globally, and Equinix (EQIX) is primed to seize this opportunity with its recurring revenue model and strategic growth.

title: MEDIA ALERT: Equinix Sets Conference Call for Third-Quarter Results
text: REDWOOD CITY, Calif. , Oct. 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX), the world's digital infrastructure company®, today announced that it will hold its quarterly conference call on Wednesday, October 25, 2023, at 5:30 p.m.
